text:
David Muir Sharnoff wrote in message ID
<199706101915.MAA09307@ping.idiom.com>:
> 	Using a simple perl program (doesn't bloat) I'm able to remove
> 	one file every two seconds or so.  At this rate, it will take
> 	over four days to remove the directory!

Tried mounting the parition async? It will help (if you are on a 2.2
or later kernel) 

Gary
